title: Amazing experience, stunning photos!

He delighted my grandchildren and had them cooperating and laughing the whole time. John was able to coerce the adults into following his direction! title: Amazing experience capturing beautiful Maui memories!

Brenda was very accommodating with booking a morning to have the pictures taken and the morning we viewed the proofs. John was delight and made the photo shoot so enjoyable and captured great shots of us. Thank you both John & Brenda for helping us to bring back with us the wonderful memories we will always have on our first trip to Maui thru those beautiful photos. Can't wait for our order to arrive in the mail!! Thank you so much!

title: Professional and Awesome Photographer in Maui

title: Amazing beach photo shoot with Grins 2 Go!
text: We had a great time with our "photo shoot" on the beach. We chose a Sunday morning slot which was great, because none of the businesses were open yet, the beach wasn't crowded, and it wasn't too hot! John was efficient and made the experience fun for our whole family (6 of us). Our pictures turned out great! Our photo shoot was complete in about an hour. Overall, we were really pleased with the experience given the fact that we were completely unfamiliar with the Maui area or the local photographers. I would recommend Grins 2 Go for others. Just note that any professional level photography is an investment, so be prepared to make the financial investment if you wish to capture your special vacation memories.
author: Karen

title: Consistently Impressed with John's Photography

title: Perfect lighting, excellent photographer, wonderful collection!

I loved the selection of photos taken too. Since it was the holidays, I really wanted my pictures and CD. They arrived at my door about 2 weeks after we left Maui. The photo book is such a great collection -- absolutely wonderful! Thanks so much for everything and Mele Kalikimaka!

title: Professional, efficient, and a pleasure to work with - Grins 2 Go exceeded our expectations!

If you are seeking photos in Maui, don't hesitate to go with Grins 2 Go!

title: Exceptional service and attention, felt like celebrities!

She set up an appointment with us and from the first time we met her she was fabulous. We booked are time with our photographer and that too was easy and convenient. He showed up on time and did a superb job at capturing us and preserving a very special time for us. After our time with the photographer we met with Brenda once more a couple of days later and was just extremely pleased with all of the pictures. It was hard to choose so we bought several. We felt no pressue from Brenda only an honest opinion. We would recommend grins 2 go to everyone. Terrific people too trust that special day or time too.

title: Effortless process with stunning results.
text: Our entire process was very easy from beginning to end. From scheduling our appointment, meeting our photographer and reviewing the photos for edit/order. Our photographer, JT, was on time and did a tremendous job despite high winds, 2 children (1 of them a 13 year old who didn't want to be there or have his picture taken) and a mom who is never happy with photos of herself. Our pictures turned out great! What I loved about the process is that I never felt like I was pressured to order additional pictures. Everyone was helpful and we're extremely happy with our pictures! The delivery time was even faster than I expected. I would highly recommend Grins 2 Go Beach Portraits Maui.

title: Professional, friendly, and stunning photos from Grins 2 Go
text: Everything about our photo experience was great. John & Brenda are extremely friendly, professional, knowledgeable & easy to work with. John knew where he wanted to take our photos &, amazingly, had us easily changing poses. He was happy to not only take group photos, but also pictures of just our daughter & pictures of just my husband & myself. He was so laid back & friendly, it was like having pictures taken by an old friend. It was the same working with Brenda when we scheduled our appointment & when we met with her to look at our photos. We never felt pressure to buy. That said, all three of us, including our teenage daughter, were stunned by how fantastic ALL the pictures were. We not only bought all the pictures, but also had two enlargements made. The enlarged metal photo is incredible. Everyone who has seen our photos has told us how how great we look &, realizing they are professional pics without us having said anything, ask who took them. We strongly recommend Grins 2 Go to everyone, individuals & families, & for all occasions, ranging from a family photo while on vacation to a wedding. Brenda & John & Grins 2 Go receives 5 stars!!

title: Grins 2 Go made our Maui vacation unforgettable!
text: Before our visit to Maui we scheduled an appointment with Grins 2 Go. I am so happy we did. My main goal was to get a picture of my family to hang on our fireplace over the mantle. Since vacationing is our favorite activity I figured a picture from Maui might work. From my phone call with John before we left right to picking out our picture it was a first class experience. First he was very informative and answered all my questions, even offering advice on our outfit options. Once we were there we changed the location of the shoot at their booth at Whaler's Village with no problem at all. John arrived before us the day of the shoot and the location at Front Street was everything that I could hope for in background options. John listened to what my goal was for the portrait and was open to suggestions for possible shoots but really he was so experienced no suggestions were really needed but I love that he offered that to me. The shoot was quick, easy and painless. When we meant for our proof viewing John's wife was very helpful in narrowing down our options for the ones we liked. I have to be honest they were all good so it was not getting rid of the bad ones, it was more like picking between similar shoots and finding which ones we really really loved as opposed to just loving it. The computer software they use to help you with the process of finding the right best shoots was easy to use and also easy to move between the pictures to compare them. We were left with over a dozen pictures that I could not live without so I purchased the digit version of them. When our prints and CD's arrived I was overly pleased with the final products. I would recommend John and Grins 2 Go to everyone I know that is heading to Maui. I will smile every time I look up at my fireplace and remember such a wonderful vacation and how happy we were.
